subject: Discovery: Test plan mode approval events
description:
Trigger EnterPlanMode and ExitPlanMode to capture plan approval event structure.

HYPOTHESIS: Plan mode sends approval request events before proceeding with implementation.

Test scenarios:
1. "Enter plan mode and create a plan for adding user authentication"
2. "Use plan mode to design a database migration system"
3. Monitor for approval/consent events at EnterPlanMode and ExitPlanMode

Files: internal/tui/claude/events.go (keep event logging active)

Deliverable:
- Captured plan mode event JSONs
- Documentation of plan approval flow
- Confirmation: Does plan approval work in stream-json? (YES/NO/PARTIAL)

Acceptance:
- [ ] EnterPlanMode triggered successfully
- [ ] ExitPlanMode approval event captured (if exists)
- [ ] Event schema documented
- [ ] Response protocol identified
